JUDGMENT WAS REACHED BY STIPULATION. PLAINTIFF, CHARLES M. TRACEY SHALL HAVE JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT ROBERT PRICE IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,650.00 AND RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISES AT 505 O'FARRELL STREET #411, SAN FRANCISCO. A WRIT OF POSSESSION SHALL ISSUE IMMEDIATELY BUT ACTUAL EVICTION IS STAYED UNTIL AFTER 9AM, 12-7-94. THERE ARE NO OTHER PEOPLE LIVING ON THE PREMISES WHO CLAIM A RIGHT OF POSSESSION. EACH SIDE WAIVES ALL CLAIMS AGAINST EACH OTHER. EACH SIDE SHALL EXECUTE A MUTUAL RELEASE AGAINST EACH OTHER. IF DEFENDANT COMPLIES WITH ALL TERMS OF THE JUDGMENT AND TURNS OVER APARTMENT KEYS TO PLAINTIFF PRIOR TO EVICTION DATE, THE JUDGMENT SHALL BE DEEMED SATISFIED IN FULL OR THE JUDGMENT SHALL BE SET ASIDE AND THE CASE DISMISSED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRICE, ROBERT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 505 O'FARRELL STREET, #411 SAN FRANCISCO, CA $1,650.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,650.00, STAYED UNTIL DEC-07-1994, LEASE FORFEITED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PRICE, ROBERT
